vocab.meaning: với lấy/tìm kiếm theo bản năng
vocab.example: Whenever I step out, my phone is the first thing I reach for to ensure I can navigate the city.
I often have to sort through my bag to find my keys, as they always seem to vanish at the bottom.

vocab.meaning: nạp đầy/bổ sung (thường là pin hoặc tiền thẻ)
vocab.example: I always top up my commute card before leaving so I don't get stranded at the train station.

vocab.meaning: vơ lấy/mang theo một cách nhanh chóng
vocab.example: I usually pick up a pair of sunglasses on my way out if the weather looks particularly bright.

vocab.meaning: xoay sở/sống ổn chỉ với (một lượng đồ ít ỏi)
vocab.example: On short errands, I can easily get by with just my digital wallet and a set of house keys.

vocab.meaning: kéo khóa lại (để bảo vệ đồ đạc)
vocab.example: I make sure to zip up my crossbody bag tightly to prevent anything from falling out in crowded areas.

vocab.meaning: loay hoay/nghịch (thường là thiết bị điện tử)
vocab.example: I always carry my wireless earbuds so I can mess around with my favorite playlists during the commute.

vocab.meaning: dùng đến khi cần thiết/phương án dự phòng
vocab.example: I carry a physical map as something to fall back on in case my phone battery dies in an unfamiliar area.

vocab.meaning: giữ chặt/mang theo bên mình (đồ vật quý giá)
vocab.example: I tend to hold onto my umbrella even on cloudy days, just to be prepared for a sudden downpour.

vocab.meaning: lục lọi để lấy ra (thứ gì đó bị vùi sâu)
vocab.example: It can be quite embarrassing to dig out my identification card from a cluttered bag while standing in a queue.
